mapper.select: SELECT id, name, hashed_key, prefix, expires_at, last_used_at, created_at FROM api_key ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO api_key (id, name, hashed_key, prefix, expires_at, last_used_at, created_at) VALUES ( #{id, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.ApiKeyIdTypeHandler}, #{name}, #{hashedKey}, #{prefix}, #{expiresAt}, #{lastUsedAt}, #{createdAt} )
